title: Teledyne Releases Supplement to its Corporate Social Responsibility Report
text: THOUSAND OAKS, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) announced today that the 2022 Supplement to Teledyne's Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) Report is now available on its website at www.teledyne.com at the Corporate Social Responsibility link under “Who We Are.” The 2022 Supplement includes updated data for fiscal year 2022 and supplements disclosures made in the 2022 CSR which was last published on November 9, 2022. title: Teledyne e2v announces next generation of high-performance global shutter CMOS image sensors
text: GRENOBLE, France, Nov. 21, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Teledyne e2v, a Teledyne Technologies [NYSE: TDY] company and global innovator of imaging solutions, announces Emerald™ Gen2, its new state-of-the-art CMOS image sensor family. Built on Teledyne e2v's advanced imaging technologies, this new family delivers enhanced performance, making the new sensors ideal for a wide range of machine vision uses, outdoor surveillance, and traffic detection and monitoring cameras.

title: Teledyne Relays Unveils Compact SP8T, DC-40 GHz Coaxial Switches
text: HAWTHORNE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #teledynerelays--Teledyne Relays, a pioneer in advanced switching solutions announces the launch of its latest innovation: the DC-40 GHz, SP8T Coaxial Switch. This addition provides space-saving for Matrix Box builds for the automated test equipment (ATE) industry by expanding the number of throws from 6 to 8 in a compact design, delivering unparalleled flexibility and performance in switching applications.
